title: More Piglins
description: Ddd new disigns for the piglins. This texture pack required optifine. Made by FabichGM
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37874d1e060ac7532d28a726bcbcc6aec65b5941.png)
This resource pack add new textures for the piglins and piglins brutes :D Requires OptiFine **or** [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) for Fabric! New piglins for a new experience!!! Check my profile for more contents ;)
